cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 太祖
cover.subtitle:
위화도에서 한양까지,
새 왕조가 열린 7년.
cover.imagePrompt: Late 14th century Korean illustration. ONE Korean general in deep crimson and navy military robe with leather scale armor, standing on a riverbank at Wihwa Island looking back toward the south. Wide Amnok river behind, dark mountains, soft overcast sky. Composition: single decisive figure, hand on sword hilt, contemplative resolve. Color: deep crimson + navy + ink-black + hanji beige. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 위화도 회군. 이성계가 군대를 돌려 개경 진격.
과전법 시행. 조준·정도전이 사전 개혁 주도.
공양왕 양위. 이성계 즉위, 국호 조선 확정.

items.name: 정몽주
items.desc: 고려 유지 주장, 선죽교에서 이방원에게 피살.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 위화도 회군의 4불가론 내용과 과전법의 수조권 지급 범위(경기 지역)를 정확히 묻는다. 정몽주는 온건파, 정도전은 급진파로 구분할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized horse silhouette turned mid-stride suggesting the Wihwa-do return, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small palace gate silhouette suggesting Gyeongbokgung. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B91C1C accent + ink-black outline. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
